meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.1: The one marks the pioneer, expressing independence, initiative and a will to lead.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.2: The two marks the peacemaker, expressing balance, partnership and quiet receptivity.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.3: The three marks the communicator, expressing creativity, sociability and joyful self-expression.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.4: The four marks the builder, expressing stability, diligence and a practical love of order.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.5: The five marks the seeker, expressing freedom, adaptability and a curious appetite for experience.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.6: The six marks the carer, expressing responsibility, compassion and devotion to family and community.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.7: The seven marks the thinker, expressing analysis, introspection and a search for hidden truth.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.8: The eight marks the achiever, expressing authority, ambition and a capacity for material mastery.
meanings.cyrillic_pythagorean.number.9: The nine marks the humanitarian, expressing idealism, compassion and a generous, far-reaching vision.
